originalTitle: I think I downloaded the wrong game...
content: I was playing Five Nights At Freddy's for the first time and saw chica, she distracted me and jump scared me. #fivenightsatfreddys #fivenightsatfreddys2 #toychica
chineseContent: 我第一次玩《玩具熊的五夜后宫》时，看到了琪卡，她分散了我的注意力，还跳了起来，吓到了我。 # Fivenightsatfreddys # Fivenightsatfreddys2 #toychica
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 YouTube 热门视频信号，适合用于观察大众注意力、内容叙事、传播主题和跨平台选题机会。
